flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Dominguez Hills rose 24% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.3k → $7.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at California State University-Dominguez Hills fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (52.5% → 42.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Dominguez Hills fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Dominguez Hills rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (15.8% → 19.7%).
